creator: kearark@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Mark Murray from comment #6)
Same for derivatives like pfSense CE 2.6.0

WORKAROUND:

To fix boot error "cannot open /boot/lua/loader.lua" for FreeBSD 12.3 + pfSense CE 2.6.0, in Parallels Desktop 18, enable EFI in boot flags:

Shutdown VM > edit configuration > Hardware > Boot Order > click "Advanced" button > in boot flags, add `vm.bios.efi=1`.
